message:
fix(dist): switch Linux x86_64 to musl for portable binaries

- dist.yml: change Linux x86_64 target from gnu to musl, add musl-tools
  install step for musl builds (fixes #34)
- Cargo.toml: switch self_update to rustls TLS backend, disable default
  OpenSSL dependency for clean musl static linking
- install.sh: update platform detection to match new musl artifact name,
  add mkdir -p for install directory before preflight checks (fixes #39)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,9 +31,9 @@ jobs:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         include:
-          # Linux x86_64
+          # Linux x86_64 (musl for static linking / portable binaries)
           - os: ubuntu-latest
-            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
             artifact_name: dcg
           # Linux ARM64 (native build on ARM64 runner)
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
@@ -64,6 +64,10 @@ jobs:
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
+      - name: Install musl-tools (Linux musl builds)
+        if: contains(matrix.target, 'musl')
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools
+
       - name: Build release binary
         run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}

@@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ ctrlc = "3.5.1"
 flate2 = "1.0"  # Gzip compression for history export
 
 # Update checking dependencies
-self_update = { version = "0.42", features = ["archive-tar", "archive-zip", "compression-flate2"] }
+self_update = { version = "0.42", default-features = false, features = ["rustls", "archive-tar", "archive-zip", "compression-flate2"] }
 semver = "1.0"  # Semantic version comparison for update checks
 
 # TUI/CLI visual polish dependencies (advk epic)
